expectations.evidence: Preferences sync failure caught with `console.warn` only (line 50): `catch (error) { console.warn('Preferences sync failed...') }` — still a silent-ish failure, no structured error returned to caller.
Uses throw/catch pattern throughout. SyncError extends Error (thrown, not returned). No Result/discriminated union type.
SyncError class preserves cause: `public readonly cause: unknown` passed to constructor.
No timeout on fetch calls: `const response = await fetch(url)` with no AbortSignal. No timeout on db.query either.
